nasb.text: The vision of Obadiah. Thus says the Lord God concerning Edom— We have heard a report from the Lord, And an envoy has been sent among the nations saying, “Arise and let us go against her for battle”—

esv.text: The vision of Obadiah. Thus says the Lord God  concerning Edom: We have heard a report from the Lord, and a messenger has been sent among the nations: “Rise up! Let us rise against her for battle!”

cnv.text: 俄巴底亞所見的異象。 主耶和華指著以東這樣說： 我們從耶和華那裡聽見了一個信息， 有一位使者被派往列國去，說： “起來吧！我們起來與以東爭戰。”

ccb.text: 俄巴底亚看到的异象。 论到以东， 主耶和华这样说： “我们从耶和华那里听到消息， 有位使者被派到各国，说， ‘来！我们去攻打以东吧！’”
